name: Sinkang Industries Co., Ltd.
summary: Sinkang Industries Co., Ltd. manufactures, processes, and sells stainless steel in Taiwan and internationally. The company primarily offers SUS 300 and 400 series stainless steel. Its products are principally used in the construction and decoration, kitchen and dining cutlery, and household electrical appliances, as well as in the petrochemical, food processing, transportation equipment, electrical machinery, office equipment, and other processing industries. Sinkang Industries Co., Ltd. was founded in 1971 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
